system_descriptions.lotka_volterra: Lotka-Volterra (prey, predator), α=1.1, β=0.4, δ=0.1, γ=0.4 — H1 SMOOTH/PERIODIC
system_descriptions.van_der_pol: Van der Pol stiff relaxation oscillator, μ=5.0 — borderline SMOOTH/PERIODIC (stiff but periodic)
system_descriptions.lorenz: Lorenz σ=10, ρ=28, β=8/3 — H1 BROADBAND/CHAOTIC

scope_note: P3.6 multi-state ODE solver demo (extends P3.5 to vector-state). NOT a paper claim; not in verify_paper_integrity contract.
